summary: BLS source package that exposes LAUS constants and forwards metro LAUS workflows without depending on the shared metro package.
Public BLS package surface for LAUS helpers plus dynamic access to the metro LAUS ingest workflow.
Defines Glynn-Fox metro LAUS series-ID constants and builders for BLS annual labor-market ingestion.
Owns ACS-specific aggregation from tract-level ACS inputs into Glynn-Fox metros using shared metro county membership.
Owns PEP-specific aggregation from county population estimates into Glynn-Fox metros with county coverage diagnostics.
Owns PIT-specific aggregation from CoC counts into Glynn-Fox metros with member-CoC coverage tracking.
Owns ZORI-specific aggregation from county rent series into Glynn-Fox metros for both monthly and yearly workflows.
